reasoning: The opening weekend for 'A Minecraft Movie' holds the 2025 domestic record at $162.6 million. Current late tracking projections for 'Wicked: For Good' estimate its opening weekend will fall between $112 million and $115 million, with some bullish long-range forecasts placing it closer to $130 million to $155 million. Even the absolute maximum estimates fall short of the $162.6 million benchmark needed to claim the title of best domestic opening weekend in 2025. Given that it would have to significantly overperform its highest tracking metric to surpass 'A Minecraft Movie', the probability of 'Wicked: For Good' having the best opening weekend is extremely low.
